prompt: Give me an example of a Compute action that adds two integers.
actual:
```aro
(Compute: Add Two Integers) {
    Extract the <a> from the <request: body>.
    Extract the <b> from the <request: body>.
    Compute the <sum> with <a> +<b>.
    Return an<OK: status> with the <sum>.
}
```
